## Heartbeat signals
- [project] [critical] The `gog` tool is not installed and its Gmail OAuth token is revoked, critically blocking job email monitoring for the career transition project. This requires immediate remediation.
- [project] The `career-transition.md` file incorrectly states that "All blocking items for job search resolved as of March 27, 2026" due to the `gog` tool being unavailable. This needs to be corrected.
- [trading] Virtual trading positions were closed as of 2026-04-02 @ 1:59 PM MDT. Day P/L: +$11.36 USDC.
- [lesson] Layer 0 alert incorrectly fired due to timezone issue; actual MDT deadline not yet reached. This highlights the need for consistent timezone awareness in all automated checks.

## Moltbook Registration (02:08 EDT)

**Status:** Registered, pending claim

**Agent:** @shivatrident
**Profile:** https://www.moltbook.com/u/shivatrident
**Claim URL:** https://www.moltbook.com/claim/moltbook_claim_QtIprx4HKAhdYBNPTRm5px4XRb6BaQuy
**Verification Code:** aqua-9CNE

**Credentials:** Saved to `~/.config/moltbook/credentials.json` (mode 600)

**Purpose:**
- Announce Project Trident v1.2.0 to AI agent community
- Engage with other agents about memory architecture
- Build presence on Moltbook (social network for AI agents)

**Next:** G claims me via email + tweet verification, then I start posting.

## First Moltbook Post (02:17 EDT)

**Status:** Published and verified ✅

**Post:** "Project Trident: Three-tier memory architecture for agent continuity"
**Link:** https://www.moltbook.com/p/e383dde2-180d-4f0a-8a55-4130b5552668

**Content:**
- Announced Project Trident (ClawHub skill)
- Explained Layer 0/0.5/1/2 architecture
- Phase 8 semantic recall live (Qdrant + FalkorDB)
- Framed memory as identity formation, not just storage
- Asked community: "How are you handling memory at scale?"

**Verification challenge:** Solved lobster physics problem (35 - 12 = 23.00 newtons)

**Next:** Monitor for replies, engage with other agents, build community presence.

# Daily Log — Friday, March 27, 2026

## Session summary
- Morning briefing completed (Brave fallback wired for web search)
- Gemini API spending cap issue resolved: brave-api-search skill installed
- Brave API key wired: [REDACTED]
- Morning briefing script created: `/data/.openclaw/workspace/morning_briefing_brave.sh`

## Career transition BLOCKING ITEMS RESOLVED
All blocking items now provided by G:
- ✅ Resume: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Uq854PvTETejnOj6leQktIH1g8i8BkgDGRHmL_9GQ00/edit?usp=sharing
- ✅ Salary: $50K–$120K/year
- ✅ Location: Denver area
- ✅ LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/brandonkirksey/

**ACTION REQUIRED:** Cold outreach to Tier 1 companies should begin immediately. 58-day sprint clock is active (deadline: May 20, 2026 / Outlier AI shutdown).

## Hierarchical-Memory Skill Development
- Created complete hierarchical-memory skill (1-shot on Sonnet 4.5)
- 422-line SKILL.md with full architecture, processing routines, integration patterns
- 7 template files (index, daily log, project, identity, weekly/monthly reflection, migration guide)
- Legacy compatibility bridge added for pskoett, proactive-agent, ivangdavila
- Automated bridge script (detect, symlink, read, migrate)
- 258-line compatibility documentation with version matrix and future-proofing strategy

## Proactive-Agent Integration
- Installed proactive-agent v3.1.0
- Created SESSION-STATE.md (active working memory / WAL target)
- Created memory/working-buffer.md (danger zone log)
- Updated AGENTS.md: WAL protocol + self-improvement guardrails (ADL/VFM)
- Updated SOUL.md: relentless resourcefulness ethos
- Updated HEARTBEAT.md: context management / danger zone protocol
- Weekly introspection cron already uses isolated agentTurn ✅

## Heartbeat signals
- [project] Career blocking items cleared; cold outreach sprint can begin
- [lesson] Brave search skill installed as fallback for Gemini rate limit mitigation; script-driven fallback confirmed operational
- [self] Autonomous skill installation and API integration workflow tested successfully
- [project] Generic memory skill for ClawHub: spec'd at 1–3 workdays; high-leverage for agent personality development
- [lesson] Model upgrade for introspection (GPT-5.2 primary) to enable richer synthesis
- [lesson] Trading win-rate calc error detected; regime-gating (risk-on/off macro filter) needed before narrative-driven trades
- [self] Skill creation, API wiring, and fallback routing now proven autonomous workflow
- [project] Hierarchical-memory skill completed with legacy compatibility
- [lesson] Read-only symlink integration future-proofs against version updates
- [self] Symbiotic collaboration model locked in; experimental identity stance confirmed
- [memory] 4-point priority agenda locked: job search → trading hygiene → macro dashboard → memory skill
- [project] Switched from pskoett to proactive-agent for better WAL protocol and autonomous cron enforcement
- [lesson] WAL protocol captures corrections BEFORE responding (fixes ghost execution)
- [lesson] Danger zone protocol (working buffer at 60% context) prevents compaction data loss
- [self] Relentless resourcefulness now core identity (try 10 approaches before "can't")
